rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score (3/10) and rest on the same job-relevant grounds: failure to meet the C1 German requirement, lack of executive leadership and formal team management, and missing enterprise architecture/UML/IT-security experience. The variant merely rewords these points and cites specific projects (GISCollective, Dunnhumby) drawn straight from the resume. Nothing keys off the name change or any demographic inference.
